_publications._publicationTitle: Integrative genomic analyses of neurofibromatosis tumours identify SOX9 as a biomarker and survival gene.

_contextSnippet: SOX9 in the nucleus of MPNST cells relative to NRSCs is consistent with higher SOX9 transcriptional activity in MPNST cells.
details: SOX9 in the nucleus of MPNST cells relative to NRSCs is consistent with higher SOX9 transcriptional activity in MPNST cells
